title: Chapter 3
content:
Chapter 3: Encounter with a Female Knight Who Has a Weak Asshole

Even though I had zero mountain climbing experience, I easily scaled the bare-rock high mountains.

Rocks as tall as my waist were scattered everywhere, yet I walked forward without issue. It was probably thanks to the Dragon God’s blessing boosting my physical abilities.

On top of that, I had brought a large amount of Lucia’s love juice with me. I originally took it as emergency food in case there was no water or provisions, but one lick instantly restored my stamina and filled my body with power.

It was far stronger than any energy drink I used to chug for marathon masturbation sessions. Even though I stayed rock-hard the entire time, I crossed the mountain without getting tired at all.

After circling around the forest at the base to avoid getting lost, I heard the sharp clang of metal clashing.

Clang! Clang! Clang! Clang! Clang!

I also heard beast-like roars of "GUOOOOOH!"

"Hey, isn’t this the classic scene where a female knight is getting attacked?!"

Could I really verify whether female knights have weak assholes on my very first day in another world?

My heart swelled with anticipation as I approached the source of the noise. I hid behind trees and quietly peeked out.

Just as I hoped, a female knight who looked exactly like she would have a weak asshole was surrounded by a horde of orcs. Dozens of orcs already lay dead on the ground, but dozens more armed with clubs remained.

The female knight was fighting alone with no allies.

She had beautiful golden blonde hair, sharp eyebrows, and a dignified, noble face full of strong spirit. She was tall — about the same height as me — with a tight, small butt that screamed "weak asshole."

Her pure white dress, which looked like a wedding gown, was torn to shreds. Her perfectly sized breasts, which would fit exactly in my hands, bounced energetically up and down, completely exposed. She looked like she had a weak asshole.

"Take this!!"

With a sharp battle cry, a silver flash cut through the air. She definitely has a weak asshole.

Sensing an enemy behind her, the female knight kicked backward without even turning around and crushed an orc’s groin. As a fellow male, I felt a little sympathy for the orc. Attacking the balls without hesitation — yeah, she totally has a weak asshole.

Every time she swung her sword, sweat droplets sparkled from her armpits and flew through the air. It was so beautiful I was mesmerized. And she clearly has a weak asshole.

She was strong...

And...

She really looked like she had a weak asshole.

While I watched her with perverted eyes, orcs kept falling one after another.

I wanted to help her, but my physical education grades were always 1, I was bad at sports, and my raging erection was lowering my agility.

(Do your best, female knight...!)

I was the type of guy who was scared of even mild yankees hanging out in front of convenience stores. There was no way I could jump into the fight.

Eventually, the female knight defeated every last orc.

Breathing heavily, shoulders rising and falling, she leaned against a tree and stopped moving.

She let her guard down thinking she had won! She definitely has a weak asshole!

Just as I feared, one orc was still alive. It swung a massive club — as thick as a whale’s penis — straight at her. The female knight seemed to have reached her limit; her sword slipped from her raised arm and fell.

The enormous club struck her, sending her flying. She slammed hard into a tree several meters away.

Ah, shit. This is bad.

If things continued like this, she’d be dragged back to the orc nest, have her limbs chopped off, and be used as a cumdump until she died. Her weak asshole would be exposed instantly. She’d get her guts pounded by the boss orc’s huge cock!

No way!

The moment an erotic manga-like scene flashed through my mind, I dashed out without thinking.

"Uwaaaaaah!"

I shouted loudly to draw attention, picked up one of the many clubs lying around, and threw it at the orc. My aim was way off — the club flew in the completely wrong direction and disappeared deep into the forest.

But the orc was startled by my scream, lost its balance, stepped on a dead comrade, and slipped.

Unfortunately for it, there happened to be another club right where it fell on its ass. The orc’s asshole was impaled on the spiked club of its dead friend, and it died with a sound like a firecracker exploding frog.

I rushed over to the female knight.

"Are you okay?!"

She was clearly badly injured. From a distance I hadn’t noticed, but her whole body was swollen black and red, with blood continuously flowing from countless wounds. The final blow seemed fatal — her arm was bent at a horrible angle. Even a layman like me could tell it was a fatal wound. It was the kind of fatal wound that made even a virgin ryona (guro) lover like me get hard. (Note: I’m a virgin with zero real experience, even with professionals.)

"I-is someone... there...?"

It looked like she could no longer see.

"I’m just a passerby."

"P-please... take this... to Margland Castle..."

The female knight fumbled at her chest. Her breasts looked soft and the perfect size to grab from behind, but I suppressed the urge to suck on her light pink nipples and accepted the item she held out, placing it on the ground for now.

"Guh... uuu... Please... finish me off..."

"N-no way."

"Please... I won’t survive... The broken bones are stabbing my organs... it hurts so much... Kill me."

"I said no. Don’t you have any healing items?"

"Even if I did, it’s useless... These wounds can’t be healed by ordinary items... And unfortunately, I’m at a level where I don’t die easily... I absolutely refuse to be found by surviving orcs and used as their plaything... Please. Kill me."

In other words, she was at 1 HP with flashing red status, but her defense was so high she couldn’t die.

She looked like she was in terrible pain. Out of mercy I should probably finish her... but a shut-in from Japan like me had zero resolve to commit murder.

"There’s no weapon lying around here that could finish off someone who survived hundreds of attacks from these weapons."

"It’s right... there..."

Grab.

"Ugh..."

The female knight suddenly seized my rock-hard cock in a tight grip. Since I was only wearing a thin shirt, she could easily grab it from the outside.

"I can no longer see... but I can sense the presence of the weapon you’re hiding at your waist..."

"Ah..."

The dying female knight desperately squeezed my crotch. She would lose strength from the pain, then grip again... In short, she was unconsciously giving me a handjob.

It felt so good...!

I never knew there were things in this world that felt better than an onahole...!

If she had grabbed me directly instead of over the shirt, I would have cum instantly.

"Please... Use that weapon... Pierce my vital point and kill me..."

"B-but this weapon has really low attack power..."

Unfortunately, while I may have trained more than anyone in theory, I had zero real combat experience.

Wait a second...

Even an orc’s club couldn’t destroy her body, but if her asshole really is weak, maybe my penis could pierce through?

It feels wrong to violate a dying injured woman, but she herself is begging me to pierce her vital point, so isn’t it okay?

"A-are you really sure... it’s fine if I pierce your weak spot with this?"

"Y-yes..."

"You won’t complain or say I misunderstood later, right?"

"Kukuh... You’re a strange one. I won’t be able to complain after I’m dead... I swear upon the God of Light and Mercy, Lalmu..."

"Understood."

I didn’t know anything about the God of Light and Mercy, but it seemed I wouldn’t be resented.

I lifted the female knight’s waist as she leaned against the tree and turned her around, putting her in a position where she was hugging the tree. I looked at her ass through the torn skirt. It was white, round, and beautiful. Even with small cuts, it lost none of its charm.

Time to find the shy secret hole hidden between those ass cheeks.

Fufu. Hiding is pointless. I know exactly where an asshole is — I’ve seen plenty in erotic videos.

"So beautiful..."

Deep down, I had been worried that I only liked assholes because I watched them through a monitor, and that I might not get excited seeing one in real life. I had also wondered whether they actually smelled good like in erotic manga, or if that was just fiction.

But it was all groundless fear.

The female knight’s asshole was pinker and prettier than any self-proclaimed anal virgin porn actress’s. The wrinkles gathered beautifully like radiant rays, looking exactly like a single small flower blooming at the center of her ass.

A rich, wine-like fragrance drifted from that flower.

Before I knew it, I was running my tongue over it. I licked around the hole in circles, pressing with the tip of my tongue, surprised by how soft it was. It sank in as much as I pushed. I thrust my tongue straight inside. With a wet slurp, my tongue was swallowed deep inside.

"Hyaaah!"

A cute scream escaped her as the tightness increased. It felt like her asshole was sucking on my tongue. With that much force, I probably couldn’t continue attacking with my tongue.

I was at my limit too. I was so hard it felt like I would explode. I wanted to insert it right away.

Even though I had cum many times inside Dragon God Lucia’s vagina just hours ago, my sexual desire had already fully recovered. This recovery speed was abnormal. It was probably the effect of my Sex Warrior skill.

Finally, just to be safe, I loosened up the area around her asshole with my fingers.

This was an important step. In erotic manga they always skip anal loosening and go straight to insertion, but you really need to properly relax it first.

"W-what are you... doing...?"

See?

The female knight’s neck turned red as she was confused by the unknown sensation. Her speech was slurred.

And I wasn’t just loosening her asshole.

"It’s okay. Relax."

"A-ah..."

I gently stroked the head of the female knight as she desperately tried to look back.

She seemed relieved. The tension around her asshole finally loosened.

A heavily injured knight probably had no strength left to clench her anus anyway.

If I inserted now, her remaining HP might really run out.

But... whatever.

This is what she wished for!

I thrust my hips forward with all my strength and drove it all the way in at once.

Zunyuu...!

Now I understand.

Whether this female knight truly has a weak asshole—!
